cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the options one by one. Option A says, "Last fall, there was the second lowest number of grown salmon returning on record." The passage mentions that about 90,000 adult salmon returned, which is the second lowest on record. So A seems correct. Option B: "The salmon migrates to the ocean when they grow up." The passage states that wild salmon are born in streams and rivers, migrate to the ocean when they're juveniles. So they migrate when they're young, not when they grow up. So B is incorrect. Option C: "The farm-raised salmon is not as delicious and nutrients as the wild salmon." The passage mentions there will be abundant supplies of farm-raised salmon, but it doesn't compare the taste or nutritional value between farm-raised and wild salmon.
